name: Frosty Fruit Smoothie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sliced peaches, fresh, frozen or canned
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine yogurt, peaches, banana, wheat germ, 1/4 cup orange juice and ice cubes.
2. Cover and blend for about 1 minute, or until smooth.
3. Serve immediately in tall glasses, garnished with peach or banana slices and sprinkled with 2 teaspoons of wheat germ.
Per serving: About 290 cal, 12 g pro, 57 g car, 3 g fat, 9% cal from fat, 5 mg chol, 80 mg sod.
